programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: UNEXPLAINED MESSAGES
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at mysterious unexplained messages from the past including the Nazca Lines, the Voynich Manuscript, the Flower of Life, Puma Punku, Leonardo Da Vinci's paintings.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MYSTERIOUS AND UNSOLVED DISSAPEARANCES
programme.desc: Legally declared dead, bodies never found. Disappearances spark speculation, media attention, and unanswered questions. Where did they go?

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SUPRESSED INVENTIONS IN HISTORY
programme.desc: Explore lost or suppressed inventions from history, some skeptical, others mysterious. Despite doubts, many are useful today. Stay open-minded as we delve into these intriguing relics.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SECRET PROJECTS AND OPERATIONS
programme.desc: Imagine a world with open use of resources from secret government projects. Little is known about these black ops. They hold mysteries and consequences, challenging democratic ideals. History reveals human experimentation, contrary to official claims.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SCIENCE AND MYSTERIES FOR 21. CENTURY
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at some of the mysteries of modern science including memory of water, reincarnation, the beginning of life, hypnosis, the secrets of Morphic fields, time travel, why we must sleep.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: PLACES WITH HEALING POWERS
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at places that are said to have healing power including Lourdes where people have been cured by drinking water from a cave, Machu Picchu, Stonehenge, the Dead Sea, the Ganges.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: This is the amazing story of how a two amateur explorers discovered one of the world's greatest civilisations, the Maya.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Pergamon and Neues Museums, Berlin
programme.desc: From Vikings who break unbreakable swords to curators who solve the world’s hardest jigsaw puzzle, discover the secrets inside the Pergamon and Neues Museums.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the National Archeological Museum of Athens
programme.desc: From a dodgy archeologist who discovers a golden mask to an ancient gadget that reveals the future, discover the secrets inside the National Archaeological Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Natural History Museum, London
programme.desc: From Darwin’s original specimens to a lost workshop that inspired James Bond, discover the secrets of Britain’s Natural History Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Topkapi Palace Museum, Istanbul
programme.desc: From assassins who plot to poison a Sultan to bitter enemies who sign the world’s first peace treaty, discover the secrets inside the Topkapi Palace Museum.

programme.title: Murder Maps
programme.desc: Victorian double killer, the murderer of a young mother and baby - a woman named Mary Pearcey

programme.title: Murder Maps: The Brides In The Bath Killer
programme.desc: George Smith had many aliases. He needed them for his many wives who he would soon murder in order to claim the inheritance. Catching this chameleon would be a gargantuan challenge.

programme.title: Naked Science: Saturn
programme.desc: Saturn is the second-largest planet in the solar system. Storms on this gas giant can cover an area bigger than the United States Clouds of the gas race around the planet at over 1000 miles per hour generating fierce electrical storms and lightning.

programme.title: Naked Science: How To Destroy A Planet
programme.desc: The Earth is built to last. It is a 4,550,000,000-year-old, 5,973,600,000,000,000,000,000-tonne ball of rock and iron. It has taken more devastating asteroid hits in its lifetime than you've had hot dinners, and it still orbits happily around the sun.

programme.title: Naked Science: Venus
programme.desc: Earth has an evil twin. Venus. It is shrouded in a lethal atmosphere of carbon dioxide and acid rain. The surface temperature is hot enough to melt lead and the pressure high enough to crush a nuclear submarine.

programme.title: Naked Science: Death Of The Earth
programme.desc: The earth is 4.5 billion years old and it is slowly dying. Tectonic activity is slowly cooling the planet – the continents will eventually move together to form a new supercontinent called Pangea Ultima.

programme.title: Naked Science: Inside The Mind Of Stephen Hawking
programme.desc: Stephen Hawking, though suffering from amyotrophic lateral sclerosis has developed a unique understanding of the universe.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry Down Under
programme.desc: Terry and Larry start off the new season testing one of the most requested films, Quigley Down Under.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Landing on Mars
programme.desc: Mars sparks our curiosity like no other planet because it is so reachable. Despite having landed there, most of the information we gather is still done by instruments in the planet's orbit.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Milky Way
programme.desc: This episode traces our view of the Milky Way, from the mythology of ancient sky watchers to the efforts of scientists to map it from the inside out.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Big Bang
programme.desc: Throughout history, our nightly view of the universe has fueled our collective imagination. When it comes to the Big Bang, not even the most creative work of imagination can rival what science has revealed about the birth of the universe.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Hot Zone
programme.desc: Mercury is one Earth's closest neighbors, but for centuries it eluded astronomer's best efforts to learn its secrets. But that has changed thanks to missions like Mariner and most recently, Messenger.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rays
programme.desc: Cosmic rays can tell us much about the universe. They are not simply another form of light, but carriers of information about powerful and unseen processes at work thousands or even millions of light years away.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Fermi Paradox
programme.desc: The Fermi Paradox asks the ultimate question: Given a few reasonable assumptions about the chance of life arising elsewhere in the universe and the distance between the stars, why has an alien civilization not presented itself?

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Landsat
programme.desc: Take a look at Landsat 8, the advanced planetary explorer with a 900 million dollar price tag! It is designed to peer across multiple wavelengths to reveal complex and ever-changing details that are undetectable by the human eye.

programme.title: Earthrise: The First Lunar Voyage
programme.desc: Interviews with Apollo 8 astronauts, their wives, mission control staff, and journalists give true insider's perspective to the space race of the late 1960's.

programme.title: Wild Asia: In The Realm Of The Red Ape
programme.desc: Tropical rainforests are one of the oldest habitats on the face of our earth – older than many of the stars.

programme.title: Wild Spain: The Mediterranean South
programme.desc: Even in the southern Spain, highly popular with holidaymakers, there is much waiting to be discovered.

programme.title: Wild Hungary - A Water Wonderland
programme.desc: Wild Hungary - A Water Wonderland is a wildlife documentary about a white-tailed eagle family, a young otter and a giant catfish that share the wetlands of this country in Europe.

programme.title: Wildest Places: Australia
programme.desc: Wildest Places explores some of the most incredible natural habitats on earth & a diverse range of wildlife.

programme.title: Wild Berlin
programme.desc: Berlin is a European metropolis and home to millions of wild animals, living their lives in a fascinating parallel world as invisible companions, neighbors, sub letters or even friends.

programme.title: Portillo's Hidden History Of Britain: Shepton Mallet
programme.desc: Michael Portillo explores this 400-year-old prison.

programme.title: The Flying Scotsman: The Unstoppable Flying Scotsman
programme.desc: The Flying Scotsman has broken records and starred in movies.

programme.title: The Flying Scotsman
programme.desc: The mighty Scotsman becomes stranded stateside.

programme.title: The Railways That Built Britain: Boom, Bust and Blood
programme.desc: Chris Tarrant explores how railways transformed the nation.

programme.title: The Railways That Built Britain: How the Railways Won the War
programme.desc: The crucial roles the railways played in the two world wars.

programme.title: The Railways That Built Britain: Steam Is Dead, Long Live the Railways
programme.desc: The dying days of steam, and how the railways fought back.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown: Salvador, Brazil
programme.desc: Tony heads back to his much-beloved Salvador, Brazil. The ever-present street festivals and the famous Carnival parade begin with sitting down with a local artist in the streets of the historic Pelo.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown: Mississippi Delta
programme.desc: Tony seeks to challenge his notions of Mississippi by taking a road trip to meet a cast of Mississippians enjoying the diverse foodways and embracing the traditional and contemporary music worlds.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: In this episode of Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown, Tony travels to Madagascar, a place that outsiders understand surprisingly little about.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony will explore several regions of Colombia from the mountains down to the Caribbean coast to the coca leaf growing inlands formerly controlled by drug cartels.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown, Tony returns to one of his favourite places on Earth, Vietnam.He journeys to a city he has never been to, Hu?, The City of Ghosts.

programme.title: The Takeout with Major Garrett
programme.desc: The Takeout is a new spin on the widely acclaimed podcast hosted by Major Garrett; a daily streaming show that harnesses the best of CBS News' political reporting and lives comfortably in deep discussions.

programme.title: Arthur: When Carl Met George/D.W. Swims with the Fishes
programme.desc: George is excited about his new friend, Carl. Then George learns that Carl has Asperger's Syndrome – can they remain good friends? D.W. and James enter the pre-school swim meet and recruit their big siblings to coach them.

programme.title: Arthur: Shelter from the Storm (Part 1 & 2)
programme.desc: When a powerful hurricane hits Elwood City, everyone's affected. Ladonna's dad is called up by the Army Corps of Engineers. Muffy relocates to a shelter. And Arthur struggles to reunite lost pets and owners.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Makes A Movie/Go To Your Room!
programme.desc: Too young to see a real "James Hound" movie, the kids decide they'll make a film of their own. Next, how would YOU like to be four years old and completely misunderstood by your parents? And then be sent to your room for ten whole minutes?

programme.title: Arthur: The Pea and the Princess/D.W. and Dr. Whosit
programme.desc: The 3rd grade class is putting on a production of “The Princess and the Pea,” and Prunella is at the helm as director! Then, Mom and Dad tell D.W. she’s too young to watch a new television show that everyone is talking about.

programme.title: Arthur: The Making of Arthur/Dancing Fools
programme.desc: When Matt Damon puts out a call for homemade videos for his TV show, he sets off a frantic rush as Arthur and his gang film their lives. Mrs. Molina is a teaching a dance class for kids. Will Francine and George be the next Fred and Ginger?

programme.title: Arthur: Buster's Breathless/The Fright Stuff
programme.desc: Will Buster's friends treat him the same after they learn he has asthma? Prankster have arrived in Elwood City--just in time for the "Scare Your Pants Off" costume party! It's boys vs. girls in what becomes a great big battle of the pranks.

programme.title: Arthur: My Club Rules/Stolen Bike
programme.desc: The gang can't agree on rules for their club, and each starts his own. Next, Francine's embarrassed by her crummy old bike. Why can't she have a shiny new one like all her friends?

programme.title: Arthur: The Chronicles of Buster/On this Spot
programme.desc: Buster learns that special effects can't take the place of hard work when conquering real mountains. Arthur is thrilled to find out that Sitting Bull once passed through town! He rallies the residents to mark the spot with a monument.

programme.title: Arthur: Buster Spaces Out/The Long Road Home
programme.desc: Inspired by footage of the moon landing, Buster wants to go to outer space someday! For now, it'd be cool to build and launch a rocket! Then, after costing Lakewood Elementary the win in a relay race, George wants to redeem himself.

programme.title: The Ultimate History of the Messerschmitt
programme.desc: In this program we look at the development of the Bf 109 which flew in all theaters of conflict in which the Luftwaffe was involved. More Bf 109s were built than any other fighter of the era.

programme.title: Hitler's Propaganda Machine: Building The Brand
programme.desc: Hitler’s fascination with propaganda was born in the trenches of the First World War. There he saw it emerge as a potent tool of psychological warfare - one that he would harness to build the Nazi movement. Witness Hitler's early propaganda tactics.

programme.title: Hitler's Propaganda Machine: Power and Persuasion
programme.desc: This episode explores Hitler's approach to propaganda in power; where persuasion was achieved through propaganda and terror, all in service of one goal: the creation of a state under one shared ideology. A new German power fueled by propaganda.

programme.title: Hitler's Propaganda Machine: Why We Fight
programme.desc: This episode explores the way Hitler used propaganda to justify his warmongering, reframing it as defense of Germany’s people and borders. It investigates the role propaganda played for both Hitler and the Allies to mobilize their countries for war.

programme.title: I Have Never Forgotten You
programme.desc: I Have Never Forgotten You provides an intimate portrait of famed Nazi hunter and humanitarian, Simon Wiesenthal. This rare biography looks closely at the sacrifices made by one of history's bravest and boldest.

programme.title: World War Weird
programme.desc: Discover the true story of a German Luftwaffe pilot in World War II who risked his own life to save the crew of an American B-17 bomber.

programme.title: U-Boat Wargamers: The Wrens
programme.desc: When Gilbert Roberts arrives to set up a tactical school for the U-boats, he receives a frosty reception from Admiral Noble. Enlisting the help of Jean Laidlaw and a small team of Wrens, Roberts begins unpicking the flaws in Walker’s ‘Buttercup’.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions: Into the Mountains (Tibet)
programme.desc: Revealing the work of a secret team of scientists and scholars established by SS leader Heinrich Himmler to scour the globe seeking the origins of the Aryan race and collect ancient artifacts.

programme.title: The Real Hunt for Red October: Part 1
programme.desc: Film lifting the lid on the secret events surrounding the Russian submarine, Red October, that went missing in 1968, and which brought the Soviet Union and US to the brink of war.

programme.title: Shadow Man
programme.desc: The dramatic true story of the most elaborate espionage operation ever mounted by one country against an ally, as Winston Churchill launches a plan to undermine pro-Nazi sympathisers.

programme.title: SAVING PARADISE ISLANDS
programme.desc: See how small-scale actions are yielding major wins for Tanzania’s marine life.

programme.title: Africa's Claws & Jaws
programme.desc: Investigate the impressive weapons and attack strategies of African predators.

programme.title: Guardians Of The Wild
programme.desc: Follow conservationists hoping to restore Liuwa lions to their former glory.

programme.title: Africa's Claws & Jaws
programme.desc: Explore the venomous dangers posed by snakes, spiders and scorpions.

programme.title: Monkey Island
programme.desc: Follow the struggle of a new macaque mother during a difficult dry season.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Uprising
programme.desc: The 'Bots reach Cybertron to find Megatron (now calling himself Galvatron) already winning the war. The minicons fend off an attack by Unicron, warning of great danger, but Galvatron believes it just an Autobot trick.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Metamorphosis
programme.desc: Escaping from the confrontation between Bots and Cons, Alex, Rad and Carlos find the cargo hold of the Exodus underground and are adopted by three minicons. Retreating to the moon, the 'Cons make the wreck of the Exodus there their base.

programme.title: Magi-Nation

programme.title: Barney and Friends: The Emperor's Contest - The Whole Truth
programme.desc: Everyone is excited about a fishing contest that is being held in the park; everyone except Ryan, who doesn't want to follow the contest rules. When Ryan is tempted not to follow the rules, Barney tells a story called "The Emperor's Contest."

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtles, Turtles, Everywhere!
programme.desc: The city's new state-of-the-art garbage disposal system's main computer DUMP 1000 is programmed by Shredder to seize the Turtles but starts scooping up every turtle in sight.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Cowabunga Shredhead
programme.desc: With the aid of the Holographic Synthesizer, Shredder creates an exact likeness of Michelangelo and programs it to invade the Turtles' lair and destroy them.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Invasion of the Turtle Snatchers
programme.desc: Donatello and Rocksteady are beamed up to a space ship - by little alien, Nikto, six thousand years old, traveling with his parents Klaatu and Barada.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Camera Bugged
programme.desc: The polarisoid, an alien tourist visiting Earth, causes all sorts of commotion with his camera which sucks everything it photos literally inside the camera, including City Hall.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Green with Jealousy
programme.desc: In order to steal nuclear energy from a submarine, Krang creates a love potion which induces lovesickness in all of the Turtles - except Donatello, who does not eat the potion-laced pizza.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Return of the Fly
programme.desc: Intent on revenge against both the Turtles, Krang and Shredder, the Fly (alias Baxter Stockman) returns with a bug of a plan. While the Turtles are battling Shredder, the insect tries to exterminate the entire group!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Mutagen Monster
programme.desc: The chemicals from two carriages in a train wreck unite to form a mutagen, and steers licking up the goo are transformed into a bull-headed monster.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Corporate Raiders From Dimension X
programme.desc: Shredder utilizes a hypnotizing device and creates zombies out of CEOs all over the city. Ultimately, the plan is to raise the Technodrome from the centre of the Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Pizza By The Shred
programme.desc: In order to locate the Turtles' lair and destroy them, Shredder opens a pizza parlour. When the Turtles order a pizza, Shredder places a locator-tracking device on it disguised as an anchovy.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Super Bebop & Mighty Rocksteady
programme.desc: Krang creates Cybernetic Clones of Rocksteady, only ten times as strong and ten times as smart.

programme.desc: Tess squares off against attorney Marc Hamilton who is representing a tobacco company that is being sued by ex-employees who claim to be victims of a second-hand smoke workplace

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica is up for a performance evaluation, but when she doesn’t show up for her appointment with the Judge of the High Court, she is suspended and stripped of all her angel privileges and power

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica is sent to help a once dedicated minister, Daniel Brewer (guest star Chad Everett), who loses his faith when his son is killed in an accident for which he feels responsible

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica helps a magician realize that hiding within his death-defying mystical personae won’t make his disturbing childhood memories disappear

programme.desc: After a string of hits with LucasFilm, Harrison cuts and runs to work with Ridley Scott on Blade Runner where on-set clashes and chaos create a production in peril.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Harrison Ford

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Harrison Ford
programme.desc: Harrison leverages his star power to gain director approval as he takes on the role of Jack Ryan in Tom Clancy’s Patriot Games. But Harrison’s outsized control behind the camera threatens to have an effect on performances in front of it.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Harrison Ford

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: A wall divides the lands of night and day. The Queen of Night feasts on blood, the King of Day enslaves all. Reuniting them is hard when Monkey and Pigsy are both distracted by women.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Codslow suffers under three immortal tyrants. The pilgrims aid a family against the rulers who draw power from pearls, paper, and wine. Pigsy nearly roasts before Monkey devises a plan to free the land.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: In a volcanic land plagued by quakes, a catfish demon and a faceless shape-changer fight. A priest claims one pilgrim is the impostor. Distrust splits the group apart.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: The pilgrims meet a man digging a mountain tunnel for 22 years. Tripitaka insists they help, but Monkey’s magic shortcut angers him. Banished Monkey leaves them vulnerable to grave danger.

programme.title: Monkey

programme.title: Ironside

programme.desc: A pool player (Michael Christian) turns down a scholarship because he feels indebted to his brother, who intends to use him for profit.

programme.title: Ironside

programme.desc: Judi Buenoano secretly murdered lovers to claim on insurance policies whilst nurse Genene Jones secretly killed at least 46 infants left in her care between 1980 and 1982.

programme.title: Deadly Women

programme.title: Deadly Women

programme.title: Deadly Women

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women burn madly with jealousy, an anger so deep they’ll kill to satisfy it. What makes them turn from “green with envy” to “lethal with jealousy?" Find out as we explore their hearts of darkness.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas: Life, Soul, And Heart

programme.title: The Game: Fits And Starts
programme.desc: Tasha and Pookie awkwardly explore becoming more than friends.

programme.title: The Game: A Woman's Right To Choose Herself

programme.title: Paranormal State: Who Is the Lurking Man?
programme.desc: PRS travels to Newcastle, CA to investigate a house with paranormal forces so strong, the family has cleared out. Ryan believes the Native American land may hold the key to the mystery and leads the team in a fight to reclaim a scared family's house.

programme.title: Paranormal State: They Only Come Out at Night
programme.desc: Once night falls in a quaint?New England Town, a police officer's family is terrorized by demons.?PRS arrives just in time with the family ready to vacate their family home, rather than suffer the advances of these spirit creatures.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Drowned
programme.desc: Kim and her family have been frightened out of their seaside Maryland home. Multiple family members have reported sightings of children with purple lips and strange noises emanating from the nearby creek.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Invitation to Evil
programme.desc: Paula and her husband Mike are under siege by a purported shadow demon in their North Carolina home. Paula has witnessed a toddler bed levitating and heard deep growls. Michelle, Ryan and the team uncover the shocking truth behind the haunting.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Cemetery
programme.desc: PRS visits a gothic graveyard, where a jealous spirit seems to be preying on the newlywed wife of the cemetery's caretaker. Ryan traces the haunting to a mysterious, unclaimed cremation urn on the grounds.

programme.title: Paranormal State: If I Should Die...
programme.desc: Proven paranormal investigator Ken Arrington leads a new class of characters as they try to help a family cope with what appears to be a demonic spirit in their home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Haunted Piano
programme.desc: Ryan and the PRS team are called in when unlucky antique collectors unwittingly bring a paranormally-infested piano into their home. The team attempts to dismantle and destroy the offending instrument.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Southern Discomfort At Sweetwater Mansion
programme.desc: PRS heads to the Deep South to investigate a haunted Antebellum Mansion in disrepair. The caretaker and volunteers at the property have many a tale to tell of paranormal activity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Night Terrors
programme.desc: Ryan leads his team to one of the most haunted places in the US to confront their fears and solve a paranormal mystery. Aside from the alleged spirits of dead prisoners, something even darker may be lurking inside West Virginia State Penitentiary.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Devil's Hostage
programme.desc: When a woman has long scratch marks mysteriously appear on her back, PRS is called in to see if they are truly facing the devil. But her credibility is called into question, a struggle of another kind emerges for Ryan and the rest of the team.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Codnor Castle Part 1

programme.title: Most Haunted: Codnor Castle Part 2

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Pucks for Bucks
programme.desc: The guys get stuck with a unit they didn't want and have to sort through trash to make their bottom line. They uncover glass blowing tools, autographed baseballs and a hockey puck launcher, which puts Ton in the line of fire.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Nothing But Net
programme.desc: Ton and Allen face their toughest challenge yet when two old rivals join forces. The guys dig up an off-road motorcycle and a pair of net guns, while the staff clashes with mystery shoppers back at Haff Ton Pawn.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fire in the Hole!
programme.desc: 1930s "blasting machine" dynamite detonator box; 1890s treasure chest with secret compartments. Ton smelts jewelry to forge bricks of silver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Cold Hard Cash
programme.desc: Ton and Allen go North to Alaska and get a cold reception from the local auctioneer. They find two enormous seaplane pontoons and a pair of Smith & Wesson revolvers, including the most powerful production handgun in the world!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Bowling Pin Payday
programme.desc: Allen & Ton visit Ton's old stompin' ground and go head-to-head with a trash-talking auction buyer. They uncover a 19th century rifle with a matching cutlass bayonet and a mechanical bowling pinsetter from the early 1960's!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Wild West
programme.desc: Allen and Ton explain their strategies at a storage auction in San Bernardino, win two units, then have a Pepperbox gun and vintage Lionel train set appraised by experts.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ramped Up
programme.desc: Ton and Allen go head-to-head with their former assistant, Carolyn, while Ton battles a bad back. The guys discover an automatic BB gun and, when negotiations to sell a stunt ramp go south, Allen faces a tough decision.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sin City Shootout
programme.desc: 1953 Chevy-inspired bumper car; scores of M16 30-round magazines; reproduction 1940s boardwalk photobooth; aerosol-powered spud gun potato launchers.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Wreck-Shaw
programme.desc: Allen drags a starving Ton to a weekend auction and some newbie buyers try to eat up all the profit. Will a rickshaw, a wrecking ball, and blast detonators be enough to satisfy Ton's appetite, or will the guys go home hungry?

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ice, Ice, Baby
programme.desc: Ton and Allen have to get aggressive when they encounter a towering opponent with a mountain of cash. The guys uncover a vintage ice resurfacing machine and an Olympic biathlon rifle!

programme.desc: See one spooky encounter in a graveyard and another near a temple of the dead.

programme.title: Ghostly Encounters (Blue Ant Media): Graves Undug And Graves Disturbed

programme.title: A Haunting: A Haunting in Florida

programme.title: A Haunting: Living Nightmare

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: In 1981, a mother vanishes from the Hernando woods and the case goes cold. Thirty-three years later, local detectives reopen the investigation, only to discover that getting a confession may be the only way to solve the case.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A year after a popular high school senior goes missing, a witness comes forward claiming to know who is responsible for her disappearance. Detectives must unravel a web of lies in order to learn the truth.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A mother-of-two mysteriously disappears after spending the night at a local New Mexico bar. The police race against the clock to hopefully find her alive, and are shocked by what they uncover.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Arthur: My Music Rules/That's A Baby Show!

programme.desc: This episode includes: War of the Depues, Update: Gypsy Fraud, Armando Garcia, Big Foot, Payback Killer and Florida Film Flam + UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina
programme.desc: This episode includes: Con Artist Cop, Astarte, Mystery Hitchhiker, Holy Grail, Update: Carlucci and Train Wreck Amnesia.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina
programme.desc: This episode includes: Suspicious Suicide, RFK Pix, Without A Song, Grace's Ghost, Update: If the Truth Be Known and Vampire Kids.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: Korg's theft of a scroll from Naroom's library sends our heroes in pursuit of the Shadow Magi to the forbidding desert realm of the Sands of D’Resh. They ride aboard a Quanjuel – a horse-like creature that can travel through magical vortexes.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Threaten
programme.desc: Sabre, Shield and Blaster together create the Hydra Cannon. Installed on their new ship, the Decepticons test it on a comet - then Megatron orders Starscream to use it to destroy the Autobot base. Problem is, that'll also destroy the earth.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: Tony's haunted dreams about his Grandpa lead the final dreamers to Orothe, where they find a surly, mean-tempered Spencer. But the kids are distracted by an unknown Shadow Magi, Mercenair, who is attacking the realm's powerful coral reef.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Vow
programme.desc: Megatron's plan to split up the Autobot team and defeat them individually fails when it's revealed that the minicons have their own, secret agenda.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: A Piece of the Puzzle
programme.desc: Zaizen has the upper hand, but Playmaker’s looking to make one last play to take him down!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Mc Crossroads / Lucky Duck
programme.desc: McGee signs a contract with Sheba the bandshee.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Truth and Consequences
programme.desc: Playmaker makes a final stand against Varis to save LINK VRAINS!

programme.title: Massive Monster Mayhem
programme.desc: Master Mayhem’s trying to get fit, with the help of his ultimate buff-bot monster, RoBro. But working out is a bit too much work, for this pizza-loving galactic overlord. So he’s sending RoBro to flex his muscles, and whip Planet Earth into shape.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Dash
programme.desc: While the battle continues, Hot Shot goes to Cybertron to try to convince Galvatron of the impending danger. Thrust's true allegiance and agenda is revealed.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: The kids stumble upon an ancient secret when their quest leads them to the Volcanic realm of Cald. Buried beneath rivers of lava, is the relic-forger, a tool used to create any relic…just by thinking of it!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: My Family and Me
programme.desc: The children are invited to a family picnic in the park, but don't know who invited them. The invitations instruct them to bring a family treasure, so each child has something special with them. Barney helps lead a discussion about families.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Up, Down, and Around!
programme.desc: When Tony brings his kite to the park to show his friends, it accidentally blows into the branches of a tree! While waiting for a breeze to blow the kite down, Barney, Baby Bop and the kids play games about "up" and "down."

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When Riff is asked to be captain of a baseball team, he doesn’t think he can do it. But Barney gives him the courage to try.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Magic Caboose - Arts
programme.desc: Melanie is sad because she misses her friend who is visiting relatives in India. Barney shows his friends that it's fun to go to new places and see new things by taking them on an imaginary journey on the Magic Caboose!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ is surprised to learn that “The Land of Mother Goose” truly exists. Baby Bop catches Barney, BJ, and Riff wrapping a mysterious present in the caboose, she just can’t wait to see what it is.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Picture of Friendship
programme.desc: After a brief misunderstanding, BJ realizes he has many friends. He enjoys a day playing with Barney and the children.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A-Counting We Will Go!
programme.desc: Barney and the kids help Baby Bop count to ten by playing games, and visiting a Make-Believe Market.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Ryan tries to be just like Barney but soon learns that he is special when he's being himself! Barney explains to Baby Bop that the word "no" can help you avoid making mistakes or getting hurt.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Parade of Bikes
programme.desc: It's the day of the bike parade. But Nick has had a bike accident that leaves his bike in need of repair by Mr. Boyd. Barney helps Baby Bop and the children learn all about bicycles—and that they are a wonderful way to exercise and have fun.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Super Bebop & Mighty Rocksteady
programme.desc: Krang creates Cybernetic Clones of Rocksteady, only ten times as strong and ten times as smart.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Blast From the Past
programme.desc: Shredder endeavours to enlist the aid of the ghost of Shibano-Sama, a noble warrior who lived hundreds of years ago, to destroy the Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leatherhead: Terror of the Swamp
programme.desc: The Turtles go south to the swamps when their friends the Frogs -and Napoleon Bonafrog - are in trouble. The source of their predicament is Leatherhead, a half-human, half-alligator mutation.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Michelangelo's Birthday
programme.desc: It's Michelangelo's birthday - and his good buddies are pretending they're unaware of it.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Usagi Yojimbo
programme.desc: Shredder's Teleporter, which can teletransport objects to a pre­determined location, interferes with Donatello's transdimensional reception - and Usagi Yojimbo, a 14th century Samurai rabbit, pops out of the Turtles' screen.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Case of the Hot Kimono
programme.desc: Agatha Marble helps the Turtles in their pursuit of Don Turtelli, including Splinter's treasured red robe - and holding Happy Hour News' April and Vernon prisoners.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Usagi, Come Home
programme.desc: Shredder has a hare-brained scheme to turn the rabbit from another dimension, Usagi Yojimbo, into an ally of his and an enemy of the Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Making of Metalhead
programme.desc: Krang creates Metalhead, an exact robot replica of the Turtles with even more powers, and directs him to destroy the Turtles. Donatello, however, reprograms Metalhead over to the Turtles' side.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leatherhead Meets the Rat King
programme.desc: Leatherhead The Cajan gator goes into the sewers in pursuit of the Turtles, and encounters the Rat King, who has stolen a tanker­truck of rat poison which he plans to change into a hypnotic gas.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Turtle Terminator
programme.desc: Shredder captures Irma and creates an android Irma programmed to destroy the Turtles. The zap-happy robotic Irma causes havoc in the TV newsroom.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Great Boldini
programme.desc: Mobster Don Turtelli and his cousin the magician, the Great Baldini, steal the famous Tortellini Emerald.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy stands in front of the pantry, desperate. The stock of chocolate spread is completely depleted. He realises that the Lemmings are making some themselves, following a complicated recipe.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Inspired by a magazine with a jewellery ad showing a man offering a diamond to a woman, Grizzly imagines himself offering the ranger's engagement ring to his beloved she-bear.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: When he accidentally sticks a computer microprocessor to his temple, Grizzy is transformed into an exceptionally intelligent being capable of predicting events to come far in advance.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings prepare a dream afternoon snack with the last jar of chocolate spread in the cupboard. Tough luck, Grizzy is coming. Caught off guard, the Lemmings hide the jar in a teddy bear-pyjama case to slip away without arousing suspicion.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy gleefully discovers that he can print images taken with the ranger's camera as it's connected to a state-of-the-art printer. He decides to frame himself, but when the time comes to print his portrait, there's no more paper in the printer.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: A van pulls up to the ranger's cabin to deliver a full crate of jars of chocolate spread. While Grizzy and the Lemmings fight over a wrecking bar to open it, someone steals the crate.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: As usual, Grizzly picks the door of the Ranger's log cabin to come in and make himself comfortable, but this time it's impossible to enter. The Lemmings have requisitioned the cabin for a party and barricaded themselves inside.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings have got their hands on some white beans which have very strange properties, when mixed with soda anyone who eats them turns into a bouncing ball. Grizzy realises that if he wants to have a nap, he must get rid of the magic beans.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzly wants to get rid of the old piano in the garage at any cost, for the Lemmings love using it to make a dissonant racket. But when he notices a she-bear he's in love with likes the melody of Fur Elise, he decides to learn the piece.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings inherit a crate that fell off a Canadian army convoy transporting ultra-secret material. The case inside the crate emits a sort of laser beam that divides objects into multiple miniaturised versions of themselves.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Near the supermarket, a machine hands out surprise eggs in exchange for a coin. Amongst the lots to be won, there is a super firework rocket the Lemmings dream of.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: At the Ranger's home, Grizzy finds a high-tech gadget that enables you to learn anything within seconds thanks to electrodes hooked to the brain, meaning that he can become the perfect bear.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: An old metal box found by chance in a recess of a cliff brings back childhood memories for Grizzy and the Lemmings.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy struggles to watch a documentary on salmon fish, nice and comfy on the sofa, as the Lemmings play chemistry novices with a fun experiment box.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy's TV remote control is stolen by a partridge who collects high-tech objects in his nest perched high up in a tree. This is a case of absolute urgency.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy has got it into his head to offer a butterfly to the bear he's in love with. But the Lemmings fight with him over the rare specimens he's spotted.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings have discovered an addictive new game based on the astonishing bouncing properties of the ranger's new running shoes.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy babysits for the she-bear he has a crush on. There's no question of Grizzy tripping up, as he has no intention of taking any risks, but he hasn't reckoned on the Lemmings.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Unwilling to share the food both he and the Lemmings are wild about, Grizzy locks it up inside the ranger's brand new and apparently burglar-proof safe.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy is impressed by the TV show of a magician who transforms a partridge into a bouquet of flowers. To get rid of the Lemmings once and for all, for they exasperate him with their incessant games, Grizzy tries the magic trick on them.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy's TV remote control is stolen by a partridge who collects high-tech objects. This is a case of absolute urgency. Grizzy has no other choice but to requisition the Lemmings' propulsion game to recover his possession.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings have discovered a truly wild new game, an augmented reality programme on the ranger's digital tablet. Grizzy confiscates this toy and becomes a fan of the salmon fishing game.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The only edible food item left in the ranger's cabin is a salmon stuck inside a block of ice. Starving, Grizzly decides to melt the ice with the blow-dryer. Only the Lemmings are already using it for their latest rocket game in the piping system.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings have unearthed a box filled with birthday fountains of light that spit forth giant bursts of sparks. They have a blast, but their new game is not really compatible with a bear's nap.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy's last jar of chocolate spread has been pinched by the Lemmings, who are savouring it in secret.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Wedged in his sofa to relieve his aching back, Grizzly baulks at getting up. He designs clever strategies to do everything from a distance, including confiscating the Lemming's radio-controlled toy robot transformer, which he will use as a butler.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The vibrations created by Grizzly's snoring during his nap give the Lemmings an idea for a bouncing game. But when Grizzly changes positions and his snoring stops, the Lemmings must find other sources of vibrations.

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Arriving in Goldenrod City, Ash is ready for his next Gym battle, but the Gym appears to be closed. Their plans delayed, our heroes decide to explore the vibrant city.

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: After losing to Whitney at the Goldenrod Gym, Ash is thinking of a rematch with her powerful Miltank. When Whitney suggests a trip to a Miltank dairy, it’s just the chance he's is looking for!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: With his new Gym badge in hand, Ash is asked to appear on a local radio station. But while he's acting out a radio drama with some 'professional actors,' the scripted danger becomes all too lifelike!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: A Bug Pokémon Catching Contest turns into a hive of activity when Ash goes up against his rival Casey—and it isn’t long before the Team Rocket villains swarm the scene, intent on catching a few things for themselves…

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: On the way to Ecruteak City, our heroes are trapped on the wrong side of a river. To get across, they first have to find a Sudowoodo...which, even for an expert, is no easy feat!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: When an ex-student of Professor Oak’s discovers some restored Omanyte and Omastar in the wild, our heroes are called into action to save these prehistoric Pokémon from harsh times with Team Rocket!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: The Pidgey Express courier service is in need of our heroes' helping hands, especially when Team Rocket wants to have the delivery Pidgey signed, sealed, and delivered to the Boss!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Caught in a sudden downpour, our heroes find a castle clinic that uses Pokémon healers to help patients. But when Brock and the doctor end up trapped in the castle's labyrinth, a helping hand is needed to get them out!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: After meeting the elderly owner of a Pokémon dojo, Ash is called upon to replace the man's granddaughter as the chosen heir! But when a vicious challenger approaches, can Ash help defend the dojo from destruction?

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Chikorita, Cyndaquil, and Totodile find themselves separated from the group and stuck in a ravine! When Meowth finds himself stuck too, an unlikely partnership forms!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Misty is reeled into a rivalry at a local Seaking fishing competition. Can she come out on top?

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch a little boy help his mum paint some Rangoli patterns for the festival of Diwali. A decoration appears in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies love jump, but they stop to see Andy Brown and some children take a trip on a boat to see Funghi the Dolphin. The Teletubbies are out in Teletubbyland. When they meet each other, they say hello, making sure no-one is missed out.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies have fun creeping round the column in Home Hill before watching some children doing gymnastics. Laa-Laa plays catch ball indoors with the other Teletubbies, but the Noo-Noo catches the ball first.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The toaster makes an extra piece of Tubby Toast – but who is going to eat it? The Teletubbies watch Emily And Jamie take their dog Jessie for a walk before giving her a bath.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch Sarah and Mark give their sheep a winter-feed. In Teletubbyland, the Teletubbies cannot decide whether to have Tubby Custard or Tubby Toast, so they go outside to play.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are asleep, but Noo-Noo tidies up their blankets. They stop chasing him to watch some children learn about the number five.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch a little boy show his friend his scrapbook. Tinky Winky puts Dipsy’s hat inside his bag. Then the Noo Noo sucks Tinky Winky’s bag inside his tummy.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A door appears in Teletubbyland. The Tubbies have great fun opening and closing, knocking on and going through the door.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky counts to five. The Teletubbies watch some children feeding lambs. Dipsy makes up a magic tune and wakes up the other Teletubbies.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Samira and her friends show the Teletubbies their gymnastic routines. The Teletubbies do their own gymnastics.

programme.title: Smurfs (Classic)
programme.desc: Chip Off the Old Smurf / Lumbering Smurfs

programme.title: Smurfs (Classic)
programme.desc: A Hovel Is Not a Home / Speak for Yourself, Farmer Smurf

programme.title: Smurfs (Classic)
programme.desc: Hefty's Heart / To Smurf a Thief

programme.title: Smurfs (Classic)
programme.desc: The Noble Stag

programme.title: Smurfs (Classic)
programme.desc: Forget-Me-Smurfs / A Gift for Papa's Day

programme.title: Smurfs (Classic)
programme.desc: Handy's Sweetheart

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Brown is suspended when he and an off-duty officer (Linden Chiles) become involved in a drug arrest that ends in a shooting.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women burn madly with jealousy, an anger so deep they’ll kill to satisfy it. What makes them turn from “green with envy” to “lethal with jealousy?" Find out as we explore their hearts of darkness.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: A lovely lady with an innocent smile, kind eyes, a charming personality? No one would suspect a woman like that would murder. These women don’t look or behave like killers.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Under His Control
programme.desc: These are love stories with bleak, bloody endings. Blinded by desire, obsessed and malleable, some women fall into lethal relationships with dangerous, controlling men.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: No one doubts a woman’s capacity to love, but sometimes lust can turn lethal. In the ultimate fatal attraction, "Deadly Women" looks at cases of murder driven by obsessive love.

programme.title: Deadly Women

programme.title: CBS News Roundup

programme.title: Arthur: Binky Wrestles with a Story/All Will Be Revealed

programme.title: Arthur: Cents-less/Buster the Lounge Lizard
programme.desc: Mr. Ratburn decides it's time for his class to learn a little about money. For the entire weekend, no one in the class can spend a cent. Buster has the brand-new Dark Bunny Dark Buggy, complete with grappling hook and voice commands!

programme.title: Arthur: D.W. on Ice/Spoiled Rotten!
programme.desc: D.W. tells her friends that she's a fantastic skater, but she can barely stand on ice! With a skating party coming up, how will she face everyone and tell them the truth? Accused of being spoiled, Muffy sets out to prove her friends wrong.

programme.title: Arthur: So Funny I Forgot to Laugh/The Best Day Ever
programme.desc: Arthur thinks his jokes about Sue Ellen's new sweater are in good fun but Sue Ellen's feelings are hurt. Has Arthur become a bully? Everyone is reminiscing about their "best days." Except Arthurs. Is it possible he doesn't have one?

programme.title: The Rhythm and Roots of Arthur
programme.desc: Pack your bags, buckle your seatbelts, and get ready for an ARTHUR road trip to the family farm! Arthur’s Great-Grand Uncle Theo is celebrating his 85th birthday, so the Reads (and Buster) are off to Ohio to join in the festivities.

programme.title: Arthur: Kids Are From Earth, Parents Are From Pluto/Nerves Of Steal
programme.desc: It’s Lakewood Elementary Parents Open House! How will the kids survive a whole evening of their parents' embarrassing antics? Buster is the only kid in Elwood City who doesn't have a Cybertoy, so he decides to 'borrow' one from the store.

programme.title: Arthur: Around the World in 11 Minutes/Muffy and the Big Bad Blog
programme.desc: Pal, Baby Kate, Amigo, and Mei Lin enthusiastically accept Nemo's dare to travel around the world and make it back in 11 minutes. Then, Muffy discovers that web blogging is a great way to keep her readers up to date with her every move.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W. Rides Again/Arthur Makes The Team
programme.desc: In D.W.’s heart lurks one big, gnawing desire--TO GET RID OF THOSE TRAINING WHEELS! Then, can Coach Frensky work with a baseball team where everyone is fighting about who gets to be pitcher and no one wants to practice?

programme.title: Embedded 45' - Shooting War in Germany: Embedded 45 - Shooting War in Germany 1
programme.desc: This first episode covers the last week of February to late March. When American troops started their final invasion of Nazi Germany in February 1945, U.S. Army cameramen were at their side.

programme.title: Embedded 45' - Shooting War in Germany: Embedded 45 - Shooting War in Germany 2
programme.desc: This second episode covers the last week of March to late April. The cameramen covered many stories of victory and defeat, death and liberation. Faces of despair and joy, scenes of war and peace.

programme.title: Gestapo: Hitler's Secret Police
programme.desc: Hermann Goering’s Secret State Police were tasked to arrest and torture confessions and information from supposed enemies of the Reich.

programme.title: NEW: Great Tank Battles of World War II
programme.desc: This first part of the series introduces the first tanks being deployed on the battlefields in northern France during WWI and describes the devastating effect these steel monsters had on an infantry confronted with them for the very first time.

programme.title: NEW: Great Tank Battles of World War II

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft: The Lancaster: Britain’s Frontline Bomber
programme.desc: The Avro Lancaster is the legendary British heavy bomber that carved its place in history with Bomber Command during World War 2. That conflict saw over seven thousand of these iconic aircraft come off the production line.

programme.title: WWII Battles In Colour

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: The investigation into two double murders committed five years apart leads police to a famous hospital and an unlikely suspect.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: DNA on one of two teenage girls killed in a similar fashion on a California beach six years apart leads investigators to a suspect who worked inside the police department.

programme.title: 48 Hours

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: A missing woman is found dead in Texas; interviews with her family, friends, investigators, and boyfriend.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Whether a true crime television show influenced the investigation of an alleged rape and murder case in Atlanta.

programme.title: My Misdiagnosis

programme.title: My Misdiagnosis

programme.title: Something's Killing Me

programme.title: Written In Blood

programme.title: Murder by the Sea

programme.desc: Paul Teed murdered three of his family members in a nightclub over a dispute over money. He then fled back to his home in Bradford, believing he had the perfect alibi.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Nat Fraser
programme.desc: Arlene McInnes and Nat Fraser had a whirlwind romance, marrying and having their first child within 18 months of meeting. But Nat soon revealed himself as a womanising, violent bully. When she rebelled against him, he hatched a plot to punish her.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Brian Burns
programme.desc: Brian and Carla Burns were both medics in their 40s when they met and fell in love. But married bliss didn’t last, and divorce proceedings were messy. Carla disappeared, and fingers pointed at Brian, but he was ready with a bizarre explanation.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Lois Riess
programme.desc: Lois and David Riess were grandparents and business owners. Lois was also a gambling addict who would do anything to feed her habit. David became the first victim of a murderous rampage that earned Lois the title of America’s most wanted grandmother.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Keland Hill
programme.desc: Tiffany and Keland Hill were military veterans with a shining service history. But while Tiffany still lived to serve, Keland lived to control, stalk and terrorise his wife. He was extremely violent, but no one predicted his final act of brutality.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Ricardo Godinho
programme.desc: Aliny and Ricardo Godinho had four children and a relationship history that spanned 17 years. While Aliny put her kids at the centre of everything she did, for Ricardo they were a morbid obsession, and one that would lead to a shocking, brutal crime.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Ramanodge Unmathallegadoo

programme.title: 72 Hours: Angel of Death

programme.title: 72 Hours: The Game

programme.title: 72 Hours: Murder on Campus
programme.desc: The bizarre murder of a world-renowned anthropologist over the Christmas holidays shocks staff and students at the university where she teaches.

programme.title: 72 Hours: The Violinist
programme.desc: Surgically clean body parts start turning up on a highway. Stranger still, they have been drained of every drop of blood.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Kidnapped

programme.title: 72 Hours: Sweet Killer
programme.desc: An aging hippy is going through bad times. When he's found dead in his home with a gut of antifreeze, it's a closed case. Then a shocking confession reveals a maelstrom of lies and a story of cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Bull's Eye
programme.desc: A Girl Guide leader is found dead on the floor of her bedroom. When an autopsy reveals a bullet lodged in her brain, detectives learn they’re investigating a murder.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Thrill Kill

programme.title: 72 Hours: Mad Bomber
programme.desc: In 1996 a serial bomber begins planting bombs in public places and terrorizes the Prince Edward Island community. The mystery person leaves a strange swastika as a calling card, eluding capture for eight years.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Danger in the Woods

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Oh Brother, Where Art Thou?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: And Baby Makes Three

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Tender Trap
programme.desc: When Dog discovers today's prey is a notorious ladies man, he knows just how to lure him in. The trap includes a suggestive phone call, a motel rendezvous, and a crew of bounty hunters waiting in the next room ready to break up the party!

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Stumped on a way to celebrate Willie's birthday, Korie enlists the guys' help and Jase takes the reigns in planning a trip to the lake where Phil and Kay used to live. Meanwhile, the women realize a raccoon is inside the lake house.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Glory Is the Reward of Mallard
programme.desc: When Willie takes a business trip to Scotland to expand his duck call business, he brings the entire family along so they can reconnect with their Scottish roots. Willie organizes a bus tour to trace his family heritage.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Good Night and Good Duck
programme.desc: A special holiday episode of Duck Dynasty shows when the Robertson family took over the Thanksgiving special of a local TV show "Good Morning Arklamiss." Each family member presents a special holiday segment, with Willie and Jase serving as anchormen.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Quack in the Saddle
programme.desc: When Willie becomes the temporary owner of a thoroughbred, he and the guys take it to a local track and enter it into a race. Meanwhile, when Kay decides she wants to buy a new birdbath for her yard, she recruits Phil, Martin and Godwin.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: A Home for the Holidays
programme.desc: The Robertsons help a long time employee whose Mom has fallen on hard times by buying her a brand new house for Christmas. Jep, Jase, Martin and Godwin race to finish a deck in time for the big reveal, only to get sidetracked by a hammering competition.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: The Cannonball Runs
programme.desc: Jase enters an outhouse race to help promote Willie's Duck Diner, but when the Robertsons show up for the race, they face an unexpected rival - Phillip McMillan. Meanwhile, Willie attempts to create the world's greatest bologna sandwich.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Mo Math, Mo Problems
programme.desc: Willie helps Sadie with her homework by enlisting the guys to create a real-life version of a math problem, but when Jase and Willie get sidetracked helping Sadie, they rekindle an old argument of whether Jase can outrun a truck.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Coop! There It Is!
programme.desc: When Jep asks Willie and the guys to help move his old chicken coop into his new house, which is under renovation, Jessica takes issue with its appearance, leading the guys to yet another project - renovating the chicken coop.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Friday Afternoon Lights
programme.desc: When Willie becomes an assistant coach on Lil' Will's struggling football team, his authority is tested when the kids challenge the adults to a scrimmage. Meanwhile, Kay brings Jep and Si to an aquarobics class at a local health club.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Children's Children
programme.desc: A reporter uncovers a secret about the past of a woman who runs a home for unwed mothers.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Friends

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: A Special Love - Part 1
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark persuade a youngster with Down's Syndrome to join the Special Olympics.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: A Special Love - Part 2

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: For the Love of Larry
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark rescue victims trapped in a car, thanks to a helpful dog.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Nearly three hundred million people worldwide claim to have been abducted by aliens. Many report being subjected to torturous medical experiments. Others return with unwelcome reminders of their ordeal. Are aliens creating human hybrids?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: In the 1960s we too our first steps into a vast new realm—bound for the Moon. But NASA astronauts would soon find they weren’t the only ones out there.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Some experts believe many atmospheric lightshows are actually caused by extraterrestrials. Do they pose an imminent threat to humanity?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Millions of people believe extraterrestrial live on Earth. Are the aliens here to enlighten us or destroy us? What if the worst-case scenario happened? What would aliens do? And how would they do it?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: They’re our first line of defense in the darkest of times. And they’re often the first responders to threats from another world. Over the past 70 years the world’s military forces have come face to face with thousands of unidentified objects.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Every day, millions take to the sky in commercial flights all over the world. But decades of evidence have revealed we may not be the world’s only frequent flyers. Are we in danger of losing control of our skies to beings from another world?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: It’s the stuff of nightmares. Emergency lines are flooded with calls as UFOs appear in the sky faster than authorities can track them.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Triangle Terror: For years, the flying saucer has been synonymous with UFO terror. But is it still the spacecraft that frightens us the most? Or has fear taken a new shape?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Alien Achilles Heel. Many believe aliens are already here on Earth. Could they be plotting an attack? And if so, can humans survive their weapons' terrifying capabilities?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Countdown To Disclosure: Evidence suggests the world's governments could be on the verge of announcing everything they know about UFOs. What will this mean for our society?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 7
programme.desc: Experts open previously off-limits files in a bid to answer some of the most mysterious questions surrounding UFOs and extra-terrestrial life.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Honeymoon
programme.desc: Urgent business cuts short Blake and Krystle's honeymoon; Steven takes a job working for Matthew Blaisdel; Cecil proposes that Fallon marry his nephew.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Dinner Party

programme.title: Dynasty: Fallon's Wedding

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Falesha & Jacqueline

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Prophet & Trinity

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Thad & Sara

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Andria & David

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Ayissha & Sydney

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Hundra & Emily

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Mastermind
programme.desc: In a battle with organized crime, the IMF sets up a bizarre mind-transfer experiment to convince a syndicate leader he is being double-crossed on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Brothers
programme.desc: The IMF turns itself into a surgical team to operate on a tyrannical ruler who has imprisoned the rightful king, his twin brother, on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Time Bomb
programme.desc: To head off a threatened atomic blast, Jim Phelps gains entry to a top secret nuclear plant by posing as a temperamental artist with guest star Barbara Luna as his model on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Amnesiac

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard meets the owners of an abnormal humanoid skull allegedly discovered in Mexico in the 1930s and a researcher who has had the skull subjected to numerous tests including carbon-14 dating, and DNA in order to determine it’s origin.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard speaks with the pre-eminent investigators of the alleged crash of a UFO near Roswell, New Mexico in 1947.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Assassination of John Lennon
programme.desc: The Conspiracy Show travels to New York, LA and Toronto in order to investigate the murder of John Lennon. Several researchers posit that Lennon's supposed killer Mark David Chapman was either a patsy or a mind-controlled assassin.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Fake Arab Spring?
programme.desc: Who was really behind a series of revolts, protests, and uprisings that swept the Middle East starting in late 2010?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard witnesses a municipal employee in Toronto, Canada undergo a regression during which he re-experiences a previous life as a doctor in early 20 century England.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Philadelphia Experiment
programme.desc: Richard investigates a legendary naval military experiment said to have been carried out at the Philadelphia Naval Shipyard in October 1943.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Alien Abductions
programme.desc: Richard speaks with two alleged alien abductees about their claims they were taken aboard an alien space craft.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Pterodactyls
programme.desc: Richard speaks with several explorers and cryptozoologists who believe pterodactyls, flying dinosaurs thought to have become extinct some 60 million years ago, are alive and thriving in remote places such as Papua New Guinea.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Global Warming, A Hoax?
programme.desc: Richard speaks with several journalists and researchers who argue the theory that human use of carbon-based fossil fuels will lead to catastrophic global warming.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 2006, Nina Sharanova vanished in Oakland. Her ex-husband, Hans Reiser, was convicted of her murder after their son’s testimony and leading police to her body. Reiser is now appealing the conviction.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the American Museum of Natural History, New York
programme.desc: From a dinosaur embryo that solves a murder mystery to a spacecraft catching a comet’s tail, discover the secrets inside the American Museum of Natural History.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Kunsthistorisches Museum, Vienna
programme.desc: From the alchemy of turning silver into gold to a dance craze that changed history, discover the secrets inside the Kunsthistorisches Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Israel Museum, Jerusalem
programme.desc: From a scientist who recreates the crucifixion to an ancient amulet that proves Star Trek's Spock is Jewish, discover the secrets inside the Israel Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the National Maritime Museum, London
programme.desc: From the musket shot that killed Admiral Nelson to an anti-piracy commando raid, discover the secrets inside the National Maritime Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Metropolitan Museum, New York
programme.desc: From the mystery of a king’s madness to a silver chalice some think is the Holy Grail, discover the secrets inside the Metropolitan Museum.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: Avoiding jetlag; a demonstration of the size of the solar system; square-wheeled motorbike.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: MANMADE

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: EARTHQUAKES
programme.desc: Earthquakes happen when tectonic plates suddenly slip causing shock waves to shake the surface of the Earth. They occur on fault lines - the most active are the Ring of Fire in the Pacific Ocean and the San Andreas fault on America’s west coast.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: MEGAFLOODS
programme.desc: Water covers two thirds of the earth’s surface, and we are utterly dependent on it, but when this vital ingredient of life unleashes its fury on the planet it becomes the ultimate bringer of death.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: CONSTRUCTION
programme.desc: Bridges and tunnels have transformed the way we live, making the inaccessible easy to reach, and turning time consuming journeys into convenient commutes, but when things go wrong they can go very wrong indeed.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: AIR, LAND AND SEA

programme.title: Arthur: Caught in the Crosswires/Framed

programme.title: Arthur: The Blizzard/The Rat Who Came To Dinner

programme.title: Arthur: The Pageant Pickle/Some Assembly Required
programme.desc: School is almost out and Arthur can hardly wait for those lazy summer days by Muffy's pool. Nothing could ruin such a happy time of year, except maybe D.W.'s Spring Pageant! And then D.W. can't wait to test out her new play set!

programme.title: Arthur: Bud's Knotty Problem/That’s MY Grandma!
programme.desc: When Bud falls in love with a snazzy new pair of boots, he might face his toughest adventure yet - learning to tie his shoes. D.W. gets jealous when Grandma Thora becomes the most popular babysitter in town.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W.'s Blankie/Arthur's Substitute Teacher Trouble
programme.desc: D.W. has one little secret--her blankie. When it mysteriously disappears, Arthur is pressed into service. Find that blankie--or else! Next, the unbelievable has happened--Mr. Ratburn has gotten sick. And who's going to be the substitute?

programme.title: Arthur: The Boy Who Cried Comet/Arthur and Los Vecinos
programme.desc: Buster is convinced that he's seen real UFO's, and he uses Muffy's fancy new telescope to get the proof. Then, Mr. Sipple from next door is moving away and Arthur wonders--who will be the new neighbors?

programme.title: Arthur: Buster Isn't Buying It/One Ornery Critter
programme.desc: Aliens, conspiracy theories, the megatoad--Buster believes in everything, until his favorite show gets cancelled for false reporting. Dogs love Arthur! Well, except Carrot Cake. Can Arthur win over this picky pup?

programme.title: NEW: Great Tank Battles of World War II
programme.desc: The second episode starts on the morning of the 22nd of June 1941 when the Germans launched operation Barbarossa, the code name for the invasion of the Soviet Union.

programme.title: NEW: Great Tank Battles of World War II
programme.desc: The third episode opens with Rommel’s second offensive in North Africa.

programme.title: NEW: Great Tank Battles of World War II
programme.desc: The fourth episode sees the Germans well and truly on the retreat and the Allies are able to successfully implement operation Husky: the landing on Sicily.

programme.title: RAF: The Royal Air Force: Battle for the Skies
programme.desc: The series begins before WWI when military commanders struggled to understand what uses aviation might have. The Wright Brothers had been the first to fly a powered aircraft in controlled flight in 1903, but even by 1914 aircraft were still underpowered.

programme.title: RAF: The Royal Air Force: Battle for the Skies

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft

programme.title: U-Boat Wargamers: Stalemate

programme.desc: The story of a deadly war that intertwines Germany, Poland, Japan, Italy and Spain, and the remorseless development of weapons and bombers.
